uplink.description: Soil telemetry: soil temperature 23.5 C (id 4102), soil moisture 42.7 % VWC (id 4103)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected authored from the upstream oracle (reference/upstream-codec.js): id 4102 -> measurementValue 23.5 -> soil.temperature; id 4103 -> 42.7 -> soil.moisture. Each 7-byte frame is [channel, dataId(2B LE), value(4B LE signed /1000)]; trailing 2 bytes are the CRC slot. soil temp scaled 23500 = 0x5BCC LE, soil VWC scaled 42700 = 0xA6CC LE.

uplink.description: Soil telemetry with negative soil temperature: -12.3 C (id 4102), soil moisture 8.5 % (id 4103)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising the two's-complement negative branch of ttnDataFormat. Expected from upstream oracle: id 4102 value 0xFFFFCFF4 LE signed -> -12300/1000 = -12.3; id 4103 value 0x00002134 LE -> 8500/1000 = 8.5.

uplink.description: Device properties frame: firmware/hardware version, battery 100 %, reporting interval 3600 s, remove-sensor (no soil telemetry)
uplink._note: Upstream sample-1 (End device's properties). Upstream emits messages upload_version/upload_battery(battery 100)/upload_interval(interval 3600)/report_remove_sensor. We map the dataId 7 control frame to batteryPercent (percentage, not volts) and reportingInterval (interval field 60 min * 60 = 3600 s). Version/EUI/remove-sensor frames carry no field measurement and are dropped.

uplink.description: Length check failure: payload is not N*7 + 2 bytes
uplink._note: Synthetic malformed payload. Upstream sets err -2 (length check fail); our codec returns an errors array with the same diagnosis.
